title: abelia macrotera var. zabelioides
intro: Abelia macrotera var. zabelioides, also known as the Zabel's abelia or a variety of the Abelia macrotera, is a type of flowering shrub native to China, characterized by its clusters of small, white, and fragrant flowers. In traditional Chinese medicine, Abelia macrotera var. zabelioides is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Abelia macrotera var. zabelioides can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
